Layout.title: Questlog | Dungeon Master Toolkit
Layout.metaDescription: Manage your D&D campaigns with the power of stone and steel.

Home.heroDescription: The ultimate platform for Dungeon Masters to manage their D&D campaigns with the power of the quill and steel.
Home.bodyText: Build your world, manage characters, monsters, and items. Immerse yourself in your own unique dark-fantasy experience to organize your adventures.

imageAlts.adventurers: Group of adventurers in a tavern

NotFound.title: You have lost your way
NotFound.description: The path you tried to follow is not recorded in our scrolls.

GlobalError.heading: You've fallen into a trap!
GlobalError.fallbackMessage: A dark force has interrupted your chronicle.

Dashboard.heading: Adventurer's Panel
Dashboard.description: Welcome. From here you can access the different halls to manage your campaigns and adventures.

detailView.emptySelection: Select an item to view its details.

portal.heading: Which adventure do you wish to embark on?

creation.heading: Invoke Portal
creation.subtitle: Write the details of your new chronicle to forge the world in which your heroes will live.

step1.narrative: Every great legend has a beginning, and this is the one that will endure in the annals as the adventure of

step2.narrative: The heroes gather in a place known as
step2.placeholder: starting point (e.g.: the City of Neverwinter)

validation.requiredField: This field is vital to your chronicle.

characters.heading: Characters
characters.description: Here you can create heroes, modify attributes, manage their inventory and abilities, or remove them from the campaign.

monsters.heading: Monsters
monsters.description: The bestiary corner. Generate new enemies, adjust their vital stats and delete those who have been defeated.

inventory.heading: Items & Inventory
inventory.description: Create legendary relics, modify the magic of certain items, or destroy lore artifacts from your story.

comingSoon.main: The main administration interface will be displayed here in upcoming versions.
comingSoon.detail: Coming soon: Interactive panels, drag-and-drop, and more tools for the Dungeon Master.

loading.title: Channeling magic...
loading.description: Invoking the portal to your new world.

success.title: Portal Sculpted
success.description: The runes have been written and the portal is open.

error.title: Failed to sculpt
error.description: Unstable magic. Please try again later.
